privileged_info_summary: The dungeon level design task uses a synthetic, task-embedded design document (not from external source) describing a 6-room dungeon layout with specific spatial relationships: Grand Hall is the central hub; Entry Chamber is south; Throne Room and Hidden Vault are north of Grand Hall; Armory is west and Library is east of Grand Hall; Hidden Vault is north of Library. Task requires placing 4 specific items: Circle in Grand Hall (fountain), Square in Armory (weapon rack), Triangle in Hidden Vault (gold key), and Star in Throne Room (Crypt Lord). The task uses draw.io version 26.0.9 and requires agents to create a visual diagram matching these exact specifications.
